responsibilities: Design and implement efficient manufacturing processes and assembly line layouts to maximize throughput and minimize waste
Lead root cause analysis and corrective action investigations for production defects using 8D and fishbone methodologies
Develop and maintain process control plans, work instructions, and PFMEAs to ensure consistent product quality
Collaborate with design engineering teams to improve product manufacturability through DFM reviews and tolerance analysis
Drive continuous improvement initiatives using Lean and Six Sigma tools to reduce cycle time and production costs
Specify, procure, and validate new manufacturing equipment, fixtures, and tooling to support production scale-up
Conduct time studies and capacity analyses to optimize line balancing and labor utilization across shifts
Manage engineering change orders and coordinate pilot runs to validate new processes before full production release
